overall.description: A first-person perspective walkthrough of a sci-fi industrial canyon environment featuring a large waterfall, misty atmosphere, and futuristic metal structures built into rocky cliffs. The player moves steadily forward through the environment, passing under a massive red bridge structure and emerging into a wider industrial complex.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty waterfall canyon with industrial platforms

events.description: weapon barrel lowers out of view, clearing the foreground
mist from waterfall begins to clear, revealing more industrial structures ahead

agents.ego_description: moving forward through the misty canyon, weapon initially raised then lowered

entered.detail: tall waterfall cascading down rocky cliff face creating heavy mist
steep rocky canyon wall with sparse vegetation on top
steep rocky cliff face with industrial attachments
large red and white metal bridge structure spanning the canyon overhead
metal walkway with railings and cylindrical structures
large industrial pipes running along the right cliff face

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view near a misty waterfall in a narrow industrial canyon. The player moves forward past metal platforms and pipes, with a large red bridge structure visible ahead through the clearing mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial canyon passage under large bridge structure

events.description: passing underneath the massive red bridge gantry structure
exiting the shadow of the bridge, lighting becomes brighter and warmer

agents.ego_description: walking steadily forward through the industrial canyon, passing under the bridge archway

entered.detail: stone and metal archway structure forming a tunnel passage
large red fabric or tarp draped over distant industrial structures

segments.scene_description: The player moves under the massive red bridge structure, transitioning from the misty waterfall area into a clearer industrial passage. The canyon walls close in as the camera approaches and passes through a large archway, with a distinctive red fabric structure becoming visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open industrial canyon complex with scattered sci-fi structures

events.description: emerging from under the bridge into the open canyon complex

agents.ego_description: advancing through the open industrial area, approaching the circular tower structure

entered.detail: tall cylindrical sci-fi tower with circular details and antenna on top
multiple levels of futuristic industrial platforms and walkways

segments.scene_description: The player emerges into a wide-open industrial canyon filled with sci-fi architecture. A prominent circular tower stands in the center while the large red fabric structure drapes over buildings on the right. The environment is now fully clear of mist, revealing the extensive industrial complex built into the rocky canyon walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a misty, narrow canyon into a sprawling, clear industrial complex. It begins near a cascading waterfall, gliding past metal platforms and pipes as the mist gradually clears to reveal a massive red bridge ahead. As the camera passes under the bridge, the environment transitions into a tighter industrial passage that leads through a large archway, bringing a distant red fabric structure into view. The scene then opens wide into a vast canyon filled with sci-fi architecture, where the mist vanishes completely to reveal a prominent circular tower and extensive buildings built directly into the rocky walls.
